title: Wello - Digital Health Records Platform
problem: Personal health records are fragmented. Patients cannot easily access and share their health information.
solution: Personal health record platform enabling patients to store, access, and share their health information with providers.
technology: PHR platform, health data aggregation, provider sharing
varden_fit: Moderate — PHR could integrate with Varden's patient portal. Data portability is valuable.
notes: Personal health records. Growing category in EU.
